meaning: n.(中世纪规定人们熄灯安睡的)晚钟声,打晚钟时刻,宵禁令(时间)
examples: The village was placed under curfew.
The army imposed a dusk-to-dawn curfew.
The army is now on patrol in Srinagar and a curfew has been imposed.
Overnight, a strictly observed eight-hour curfew keeps all but the army off the streets.
Police and soldiers were patrolling the town of roughly 130, 000 Wednesday, following an overnight curfew.
